description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Visual Studio 2019 that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch. Use two parallel jobs, build_cmake and build_meson, both running on a windows-2019 environment. The build_cmake job checks out the repository, sets up msbuild and vcpkg, installs various dependencies, configures and builds a project using cmake, and collects and zips the build output. The build_meson job checks out the repository, sets up Python and meson, prepares the MSVC environment, configures and builds a project using meson, and tests the project.
